violations.text: The bottom shelf in the dry storage area has an accumulation of droppings, soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 09/23/2025
The gasket for milk chest #3 was observed in poor repair. Gaskets must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 02/24/2025

The floor by the service line has an accumulation of soil residue, droppings, and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Establishment is to clean and sanitize by the service line to remove debris. New Violation. Correct By: 02/11/2025
The gaskets for milk chest #1 and #2 were observed in poor repair. Gaskets must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 10/15/2024
Refrigerator door gasket on the chest freezer on the storage line was observed in poor repair. Gaskets must be maintained in good condition. New Violation. Correct By: 03/15/2024

The floor behind the chest freezer near the service line has an accumulation of soil residue and food debris, and droppings. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Corrective Action - the establishment must clean under and behind equipment to remove residue. New Violation. Correct By: 02/17/2024
The floor by the dishwasher and under the freezer is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 04/11/2024
The Gasket on Milk Case 3 area was not in good repair. Gaskets must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 05/01/2023

The floor in the service area is in poor repair. The floor in the chemical closet is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. The coving behind the oven, is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair New Violation. Correct By: 09/01/2023
